name: Miniprep Buffer P2 (Lysis)
nameCn: 质粒提取缓冲液 P2 (裂解液)

notes.en: Prepare fresh or store at RT. NaOH denatures genomic DNA and proteins; SDS solubilizes cell membranes. Mix gently by inversion (DO NOT vortex!) to avoid shearing genomic DNA.
notes.zh: 现用现配或室温保存。NaOH 变性基因组 DNA 和蛋白，SDS 溶解细胞膜。使用时轻柔混匀（不可涡旋！），避免剪切基因组 DNA。

storage.notes: Keep tightly closed; NaOH absorbs CO2

usage.en: Alkaline lysis buffer (NaOH + SDS) for cell disruption in miniprep plasmid extraction.
usage.zh: 碱裂解缓冲液（NaOH + SDS），用于 miniprep 质粒提取的细胞破碎。

prepSteps.warning: NaOH is caustic — wear gloves and eye protection.

prepSteps.step: Add SDS and mix gently (avoid bubbles).
Bring to final volume of 500 mL.
Prepare fresh or store at room temperature for up to 1 month.
